title: paracalyx schweinfurthii
intro: Paracalyx schweinfurthii, also known as the 'Bitter Calabar Nut', is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Paracalyx schweinfurthii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are consumed as a treatment for various ailments.
